headline: Cummins (CMI) Could Be 11% Undervalued As It Lifts Its Dividend Again
summary: Dividend increase puts Cummins in focus for income oriented investors Cummins (CMI) has drawn fresh attention after its Board approved a 10% lift in the quarterly dividend, raising the payout from $2.00 to $2.20 per share for upcoming distributions. See our latest analysis for Cummins. At a share price of $664.39, Cummins has slipped about 1.7% over the past day and 2% over the past week. Its year-to-date share price return of 27.3% and 1-year total shareholder return of 98.4% point to strong...
